recap_documents.description: PLAINTIFF MAREN TWINING'S NOTICE OF VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO FED. R. CIV. P. 41(a)(1)(A)(i): Pursuant to Fed. R. Civ. P. 41(a)(1)(A)(i) of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure, Plaintiff Maren Twining, by and through her counsel, hereby gives notice that the above-captioned action, Twining v. Facebook, Inc. et al., No. 12-cv-4099 (RWS), is voluntarily dismissed as to all defendants. This dismissal shall apply to that action only, and shall not constitute a dismissal of any other actions in In re: Facebook, Inc. IPO Securities & Derivative Litigation, No. 12-md-2389 (RWS). (Signed by Judge Robert W. Sweet on 10/29/2015) Filed In Associated Cases: 1:12-md-02389-RWS, 1:12-cv-04099-RWS (spo) (Entered: 10/30/2015)

recap_documents.description: PLAINTIFF EDWARD CHILDS' NOTICE OF VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO FED. R. CIV. P. 41(a)(1)(A)(i). Pursuant to Fed. R. Civ. P. 41(a)(1)(A)(i) of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure, Plaintiff Edward Childs, by and through his counsel, hereby gives notice that the above-captioned action, 12-cv-4156 (RWS), is voluntarily dismissed as to all defendants. This dismissal shall apply to that action only, and shall not constitute a dismissal of any other actions in In re: Facebook, Inc. IPO Securities and Derivative Litigation, 12-md-2389 (RWS). So ordered. (Signed by Judge Robert W. Sweet on 4/18/2014) Filed In Associated Cases: 1:12-md-02389-RWS, 1:12-cv-04156-RWS (rjm) (Entered: 04/22/2014)
